visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white bucket hat, a white long-sleeved ribbed top, and light blue denim jeans stands in a brightly lit warehouse store aisle. She smiles enthusiastically, gesturing with both hands towards large stacks of purple 'Sofy' brand boxes behind her. (2) She moves her hands to point at various boxes while speaking directly to the camera. The background consists of industrial shelving and numerous bulk-packed sanitary products. (3) The camera follows her as she shifts slightly to her right, pointing towards a different stack of white-packaged 'Sofy' products. She picks up a twin-pack of organic tampons to show the viewer. (4) Close-up shot focusing on the tampon packaging she is holding, showing the 'Sofy Organic 100%' logo and Japanese text. Her hands are steady as she presents the product. (5) She returns to a medium shot, continuing her presentation by gesturing between the different stacks of products and towards the price tags visible on the shelves above.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 大家搶著買. [Variety]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: 蘇菲. [Slogan]: 超低價可囤貨. (2) [Subtitle]: 少女們 囤貨可以注意. (3) [Subtitle]: 去年我們有介紹. (4) [Subtitle]: 那今年蘇菲他自己有一個活動. (5) [Subtitle]: 雖然沒有找我們合作. (6) [Subtitle]: 可是好的價格還是可以跟大家分享. (7) [Subtitle]: 首先是他的安睡褲. (8) [Subtitle]: 這安睡褲有L跟XL. (9) [Subtitle]: 像我就穿L 因為我覺得寬鬆的很舒服. (10) [Subtitle]: 他這裡一片來到15塊. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以你買接近15的都很便宜. (12) [Subtitle]: 因為我在便利商店一片要35. (13) [Subtitle]: 還39. (14) [Subtitle]: 超商是一包69元. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後有兩片. (16) [Subtitle]: 對 那這樣子一片35. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以這裡15塊 有需要的這裡可以買. (18) [Subtitle]: 然後另外一個是他的導管. (19) [Subtitle]: 就是衛生棉條. (20) [Subtitle]: 這是他新的 你看包裝超美的. (21) [Subtitle]: 我們之前只有在日本才看到. (22) [Subtitle]: 嗯 他這種是純棉表層. (23) [Subtitle]: 然後是29入 這個也有折扣. (24) [Subtitle]: 從715折200塊變515. (25) [Subtitle]: 那量多型的話是765折200塊變565. (26) [Subtitle]: 那一般型的話是8.8塊. (27) [Subtitle]: 然後量多的話一根10塊錢. (28) [Subtitle]: 你們就自己斟酌 最重要是 這是新款. (29) [Subtitle]: 所以有需求的人可以來囤. (30) [Subtitle]: 只有黑五有. (31) [Subtitle]: 感覺直接從日本進的. (32) [Subtitle]: 嗯.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female presenter is visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair, wearing a white bucket hat, a white long-sleeved top, and light blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high ceilings, industrial racks, and large quantities of boxed consumer goods stacked on pallets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, greeted by an upbeat electronic pop track with a steady percussion beat. (2) Vocal articulation is clear and enthusiastic, discussing product details and prices. (3) A brief interjection from a second, deeper male voice occurs, sounding conversational and supportive. (4) The BGM remains constant in volume and tempo, providing a cheerful backdrop to the ongoing product comparison. (5) The mix is clean, with very low ambient warehouse noise and no significant distortion, maintaining focus on the primary speech.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about specific Black Friday discounts on Sofy sanitary products at Costco, emphasizing the cost savings compared to convenience stores.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcasing, price comparisons, and 'Black Friday' thematic overlays suggest promotional content for the brand or retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-arousal vocal delivery and fast-paced editing typical of social media shopping guides to drive engagement during a holiday sales event.
